meta.question: Give me gastric cancer related research

results.input_question: Give me gastric cancer related research

decomposed_queries: Which trials have Cancer type = 'Gastric cancer'?

retrieval_trace.decomposed_query: Which trials have Cancer type = 'Gastric cancer'?

retrieval_by_decomposition.decomposed_query: Which trials have Cancer type = 'Gastric cancer'?

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type equal to 'Gastric/GEJ'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Year", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Avelumab for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer were in phase 3?

candidate.question: Which trials have cancer type Gastric/GEJ?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer used a placebo control?

candidate.question: What trials have Cancer type equal to Gastric/GEJ?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
candidate.parent_question: Find trials for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer that compared treatment to a placebo?
